question_frequency.rationale: The Pair never asks the user any didactic questions. It writes the solution end-to-end and only responds to the user's questions. No teachable-moment prompts are surfaced.

question_quality.rationale: No questions framed by the Pair, so no choice points were surfaced. Discussion of trade-offs only happens reactively when the student asks.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolded sequence; the Pair dumps the full solution then explains. Learning happens only because the student happens to ask follow-ups.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the responses are actionable (benchmark, plural fix). But the flow is monologue-then-Q&A, not pair-programming dialogue.

effectiveness.rationale: Final code correctly solves the problem with validation; slightly improved over baseline by adding the singular/plural error message refinement.

friction.rationale: Comparable to baseline in length and turns (2 turns, ~80s), with a useful empirical benchmark and a small code refinement adding modest value.
